enemies.name: Froggit
enemies.description: It watches you intently, waiting to strike.

act_responses.check:
* Froggit - 20 HP
* It seems confused by your kindness.
act_responses.talk:
* You ribbitted at the Froggit.
* It... ribbitted back?
* (Froggit seems slightly more friendly)
act_responses.pet:
* You reached out to pet the Froggit.
* It got scared and hopped away.

act_responses.check:
* Whimsun - 15 HP
* It's too nervous to look at you.
act_responses.encourage:
* You told the Whimsun it's doing great!
* It's tearing up... with joy!
act_responses.pet: * The Whimsun is too nervous to be pet.

enemies.name: Loox
enemies.description: It wears glasses that are cracked.

act_responses.check:
* Loox - 28 HP
* Its glasses are cracked, so it can't see well.
act_responses.glasses:
* You offered to fix Loox's glasses.
* With your expert skills, they're good as new!
* Loox can see clearly now!

enemies.name: Training Dummy
enemies.description: A simple training dummy for practice.

act_responses.check:
* Training Dummy - 40 HP
* It's completely still.
act_responses.talk:
* You tried talking to the dummy.
* ...
* It doesn't seem to be a talker.

enemies.name: Shadow Creature
enemies.description: A creature from the Dark World.

act_responses.check:
* Shadow Creature - 60 HP
* It flickers between light and dark.
act_responses.light:
* You used light to weaken the shadow.
* It recoils from the brightness!
act_responses.talk:
* You tried to reason with it.
* It seems... confused by kindness.
